title: Universal Actions for Enhanced Embodied Foundation Models
title_zh: 通用动作：增强具身基础模型
abstract: Training on diverse, internet-scale data is a key factor in the success of recent large foundation models. Yet, using the same recipe for building embodied agents has faced noticeable difficulties. Despite the availability of many crowd-sourced embodied datasets, their action spaces often exhibit significant heterogeneity due to distinct physical embodiment and control interfaces for different robots, causing substantial challenges in developing embodied foundation models using cross-domain data. In this paper, we introduce UniAct, a new embodied foundation modeling framework operating in a Universal Act ion Space. Our learned universal actions capture the generic atomic behaviors across diverse robots by exploiting their shared structural features, and enable enhanced cross-domain data utilization and cross-embodiment generalizations by eliminating the notorious heterogeneity. The universal actions can be efficiently translated back to heterogeneous actionable commands by simply adding embodiment-specific details, from which fast adaptation to new robots becomes simple and straightforward. Our 0.5B instantiation of Uni-Act reaches 14X larger SOTA embodied foundation models in extensive evaluations on various real-world and simulation robots, showcasing exceptional cross-embodiment control and adaptation capability, highlighting the crucial benefit of adopting universal actions. Project page: https://2toinf.github.io/UniAct/
abstract_zh: 在多样化、互联网规模的数据上进行训练是近期大型基础模型成功的关键因素。然而，将同样的方法用于构建具身智能体却面临显著困难。尽管存在许多众包具身数据集，但由于不同机器人的物理形态和控制接口差异，其动作空间往往表现出显著的异质性，这给利用跨领域数据开发具身基础模型带来了巨大挑战。本文提出UniAct，一种在通用动作空间中运行的新型具身基础建模框架。我们学习的通用动作通过利用不同机器人共享的结构特征，捕获其通用的原子行为，并通过消除著名的异质性，实现增强的跨领域数据利用和跨形态泛化。只需添加特定于具体形态的细节，通用动作就能高效地转换回异质的可执行命令，从而快速适应新机器人。我们的0.5B参数UniAct实例在多种真实世界和仿真机器人的广泛评估中，达到14倍于现有最佳具身基础模型的规模，展示了卓越的跨形态控制和适应能力，凸显了采用通用动作的关键优势。项目页面：https://2toinf.github.io/UniAct/
tldr_zh: 提出通用动作空间UniAct，消除机器人动作异质性，实现跨形态数据利用和泛化。
cover_zh: 0.5B参数碾压14倍大模型｜通用动作让机器人秒懂跨形态指令
